query: SELECT u.id, u.role, u.createdAt, CASE WHEN p.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_profile' ELSE 'no_profile' END as profile_status FROM user u LEFT JOIN jimmiProfile p ON p.userId = u.id ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
